tool.name: DNA Foundation Models
tool.description: for generating embeddings or fine-tuning models on labeled datasets
tool.command:
mkdir -p results; mkdir -p results/model; #set $model_clean = str($selected_model).replace('__dq__', '')
#if $tasks.selected_task == 'finetune' python '$__tool_directory__/finetune.py' --train_file '$tasks.train_dataset' --eval_file '$tasks.dev_dataset' --test_file '$tasks.test_dataset' --model_max_length '$tasks.training_params.model_max_length' --per_device_train_batch_size '$tasks.training_params.batch_train' --per_device_eval_batch_size '$tasks.training_params.batch_eval' --gradient_accumulation_steps '$tasks.training_params.grad_acc' --learning_rate '$tasks.training_params.lr' --weight_decay '$tasks.training_params.weight_decay' --num_train_epochs '$tasks.training_params.epochs' --fp16 --save_steps '$tasks.training_params.save_steps' --eval_steps '$tasks.training_params.eval_steps' --warmup_steps '$tasks.training_params.warmup_steps' --logging_steps '$tasks.training_params.logging_steps' --problem_type '$tasks.problem_type' --model_name_or_path '$model_clean' --output_dir 'results' --save_strategy 'steps' --eval_strategy 'steps' --eval_and_save_results 'true' #if $tasks.save_model == 'true' --save_model #end if #if $tasks.lora_section.use_lora == 'true' --use_lora --lora_r '$tasks.lora_section.lora_r' --lora_alpha '$tasks.lora_section.lora_alpha' --lora_dropout '$tasks.lora_section.lora_dropout' #end if ;
#if $tasks.save_model == 'true' tar -czf results/model.tar.gz -C results model; #end if
#elif $tasks.selected_task == 'embed' python '$__tool_directory__/embed_sequence.py' --model '$model_clean' --fasta '$tasks.fasta_file' --batch_size '$tasks.batch_size' --pooling '$tasks.pooling' --output results/embeddings.tsv; #else echo 'Unknown task: $tasks.selected_task' exit 1 #end if

validator.message: No pretrained DNABERT models are installed on this Galaxy instance.

param.name: fasta_file
param.label: Input
param.help: FASTA file containing the DNA sequences to embed. Each FASTA record is processed as one sequence.

param.name: pooling
param.label: Pooling strategy
param.help: Select how token-level representations are combined into one embedding vector for each input sequence. Mean pooling averages the token representations, while max pooling takes the maximum value at each embedding dimension.

param.name: use_lora
param.label: Use LoRA
param.help: Enable Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) to fine-tune a smaller set of adapter parameters instead of updating all model parameters. This can reduce memory and storage requirements.

param.name: lora_r
param.label: LoRA rank (r)
param.help: Rank of the low-rank LoRA update matrices. Higher values provide more adaptation capacity but use more trainable parameters and memory.

param.name: lora_alpha
param.label: LoRA alpha
param.help: Scaling factor applied to the LoRA updates.

param.name: lora_dropout
param.label: LoRA dropout
param.help: Dropout probability applied to the LoRA layers during training. Increasing this value can provide additional regularization.

param.name: train_dataset
param.label: Training dataset
param.help: Training data in CSV format with two columns: sequence and label.

param.name: dev_dataset
param.label: Validation dataset
param.help: Validation data in CSV format with two columns: sequence and label.

param.name: test_dataset
param.label: Test dataset
param.help: Test data in CSV format with two columns: sequence and label.

param.name: save_model
param.label: Save model
param.help: Save the fine-tuned model as a compressed archive.

has_text_matching.expression: Parameter 'selected_model': requires a value, but no legal values defined
Parameter 'selected_model': requires a value, but no legal values defined

tool.help:
**What it does**
- **Embed**: Generates sequence embeddings from a FASTA file. - **Fine-tune**: Trains DNABERT-2 on CSV datasets for classification/regression.
